populars.name: Thailand
populars.description: Due to Thailand's regulations, all roaming services are not allowed in 3 Southern provinces in Thailand (Pattani, Narathiwat, and Yala) and 4 districts of Songkhla province (Chana, Na Thawi, Thepha, and Saba Yoi).
populars.description_id: Dikarenakan peraturan dari Pemerintah Thailand, semua layanan roaming tidak diizinkan di 3 provinsi selatan Thailand (Pattani, Narathiwat, dan Yala) serta 4 distrik di provinsi Songkhla (Chana, Na Thawi, Thepha, dan Saba Yoi).

populars.name: China
populars.description: Due to government regulations in China, access to TikTok cannot be guaranteed. We will assist if this occurs, but TikTok access issues in China are not eligible for a full refund.
populars.description_id: Karena peraturan pemerintah di Tiongkok, akses ke TikTok tidak dapat dijamin. Kami akan tetap membantu jika terjadi kendala, namun masalah akses TikTok tidak termasuk dalam kebijakan refund penuh.

countries.name: China
countries.description: Due to government regulations in China, access to TikTok cannot be guaranteed. We will assist if this occurs, but TikTok access issues in China are not eligible for a full refund.
countries.description_id: Karena peraturan pemerintah di Tiongkok, akses ke TikTok tidak dapat dijamin. Kami akan tetap membantu jika terjadi kendala, namun masalah akses TikTok tidak termasuk dalam kebijakan refund penuh.

countries.name: Russia
countries.description: Russia government regulations require identity verification before the internet can be used. This verification process must be completed upon arrival in Russia.
countries.description_id: Regulasi pemerintah mewajibkan verifikasi identitas sebelum internet dapat digunakan. Proses verifikasi ini harus dilakukan setelah tiba di Rusia.

countries.name: Thailand
countries.description: Due to Thailand's regulations, all roaming services are not allowed in 3 Southern provinces in Thailand (Pattani, Narathiwat, and Yala) and 4 districts of Songkhla province (Chana, Na Thawi, Thepha, and Saba Yoi).
countries.description_id: Dikarenakan peraturan dari Pemerintah Thailand, semua layanan roaming tidak diizinkan di 3 provinsi selatan Thailand (Pattani, Narathiwat, dan Yala) serta 4 distrik di provinsi Songkhla (Chana, Na Thawi, Thepha, dan Saba Yoi).

countries.name: Turkey
countries.description: Due to government regulations in Türkiye, eSIM must be installed before entering Türkiye. Installing the eSIM after arrival may cause activation issues.
countries.description_id: Dikarenakan peraturan dari pemerintah Turki, eSIM harus dipasang sebelum memasuki wilayah Turki. Pemasangan eSIM setelah tiba di Turki dapat menyebabkan kendala pada aktivasi.
